name: Playable loop completion and UX polish

tasks.subject: Settings HUD panel UI
tasks.completionNotes: ESC opens/closes settings overlay. Master/SFX/mouse sliders render in DOM with stable test ids. Slider input is saved immediately through SettingsStorage and applied to GeneratedAudioCuePlayer volume.

tasks.subject: Generated audio direction polish
tasks.completionNotes: GeneratedAudioCuePlayer cue tones were differentiated and runtime volume control was added. Existing AudioCueLogic priority/cooldown tests remain passing.

tasks.subject: Stage content coordinate and tuning pass
tasks.completionNotes: Foundry, Relay Yard, and Storm Drain hazards/pickups/gates were tuned in game-balance.json. StageContentDefinition tests updated.

tasks.subject: BossWaveLogic pure domain logic
tasks.completionNotes: BossWaveLogic was added with round trigger, spawn plan, and reward calculation tests.

tasks.subject: MainScene boss wave integration
tasks.completionNotes: Boss wave rules are loaded from game-balance.json, boss wave overlay/HP/reward text is exposed through HUD presenters, match-over overlay now takes priority, and boss round player victory applies XP plus airStrike reward unlock.

tasks.subject: TutorialOverlayLogic and UI
tasks.completionNotes: TutorialOverlayLogic and TutorialOverlay UI module were added. Main DOM now shows first-run tutorial, supports skip/don't-show-again, and settings replay resets tutorial persistence.

tasks.subject: Playwright smoke for boss/tutorial/settings
tasks.completionNotes: tests/e2e/phase4-smoke.spec.ts covers tutorial progression, ESC settings overlay, settings persistence, boss wave overlay, and boss reward unlock. Screenshots are produced for settings, boss, and after-boss states.

tasks.subject: Verification gates and status report
tasks.completionNotes: type-check, lint, unit tests, build, and Playwright E2E all passed. Project status report updated for Vision review.
